distractors.title: Network Traffic Flow Prediction in Cloud Data Centers
distractors.abstract: This paper studies network traffic flow prediction for cloud data center routing. It focuses on packet-level workload forecasting, bandwidth allocation, and server-side congestion, rather than urban transportation systems.

distractors.title: Spatio-Temporal Prediction of Website Traffic Flow
distractors.abstract: The study predicts website traffic flow using temporal attention models for user visits and page requests. The application scenario is online service management instead of road traffic or intelligent transportation.

distractors.title: Vehicle Communication Protocols in Online Game Engines
distractors.abstract: This work discusses communication between simulated vehicles in a distributed game engine. It focuses on graphics synchronization and message passing, not intelligent connected vehicles or road-side infrastructure.

distractors.title: Everything-to-Everything Communication in Industrial IoT
distractors.abstract: The paper studies general device communication in industrial IoT networks. Although it discusses communication reliability, it does not address V2X, vehicular networks, connected vehicles, or transportation scenarios.

distractors.title: Signal Control for Wireless Traffic Scheduling
distractors.abstract: This paper proposes signal control policies for wireless network traffic scheduling. The work studies packets, channels, and queueing delay rather than road intersections or traffic lights.

distractors.title: Reinforcement Learning for Signal Control in Digital Communication
distractors.abstract: The study applies reinforcement learning to signal control in digital communication systems. It does not discuss urban intersections, road traffic, or intelligent transportation systems.
